mapper.select: SELECT a.ACTIVITY_ID , a.GURU_CD , g.INVESTOR_NM , g.INVESTOR_KO_NM , g.INVESTOR_NICKNAME , a.ACTIVITY_TYPE , a.ISSUER_NM , a.TICKER , a.ACTIVITY_DATE , a.ACTIVITY_YEAR , a.ACTIVITY_QTR , a.CHANGE_PCT , a.NOTES , a.REG_DT FROM tbl_guru_recent_activity a JOIN tbl_guru g ON g.GURU_CD = a.GURU_CD WHERE a.ACTIVITY_ID = #{id}
